offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 sales/week, delayed sales reporting causes missed inventory optimization opportunities. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to generate timely sales reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers discussions on similar reporting issues
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Community forums for Shopify tools and resources
try_it: Let users try Weekly sales report generation and Customizable report templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
